subcodes.first_line: O Perfumer of Divine Unity! Perfume all contingent beings with the fragrance that was wafted from the Garment, then stand thou firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عطار الاحدیه عطر الممکنات بعطر الذی کان عن جهه القمیص مرسولا ثم استقم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
